title: Thai Tacos
description: A fusion of Thai and Mexican flavors in a taco. The delicate fish is marinated in a mix of Thai spices and herbs, then pan-seared to perfection and served in a crispy taco shell.
instructions: 1. In a small bowl, mix together the Thai red curry paste, fish sauce, and lime juice.
2. Add the fish fillet to the marinade and mix well to coat.
3. Let the fish marinate for at least 15 minutes.
4. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Remove the fish from the marinade and add it to the skillet.
6. Cook the fish for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it is cooked through.
7. Warm the taco shells according to package instructions.
8. Slice the cooked fish into thin strips.
9. Assemble the tacos by placing a few strips of fish onto a warmed taco shell and topping with diced onion, diced bell pepper, and chopped cilantro.
